title: Help Wanted Ad
text:
## Help Wanted

Now hiring a {adjective} {job} to join our {adjective} team downtown.

**Requirements:**
- Must be able to {verb} quickly
- Lift {number} pounds
- Remain {adjective} during emergencies involving {plural noun} or spilled {food}

**Benefits:**
- {adjective} dental
- Unlimited {plural noun}
- One {adjective} holiday per month

**How to apply:** In person wearing {adjective} attire with a {object} resume.

**Ideal candidate:** {number} years experience; can {verb} without supervision. No {adjective} applicants, please.
